results.rendered_html:
gadya (von gad)  P. 3,1,100 .  VOP. 26,15 .
1〉 adj. zu sagen: gadyametattvayā mama  BHAṬṬ. 6,47 .
— 2〉 n.  AK. 3,6,3,31 . ungebundene Rede: yajuṣāmṛcāṃ sāmnāṃ ca gadyānāṃ caiva sarvaśaḥ . āsīduccāryamāṇānāṃ nisvano hṛdayaṃgamaḥ ..  MBH. 3,966 .  SĀH. D. 566 . 568 . gadyapadyamaya 569 . 570 .

results.rendered_html:
gadya pot. p. [gad-yat] To be spoken or uttered; gadyametattvayā mama  Bk. 6. 47. 
— dyaṃ Prose, elaborate prose composition, composition not metrical yet framed with due regard to harmony; one of the three classes into which all compositions may be divided; see  Kāv. 1. 11.
